log.idle-warning: Automation will ONLY run when you are idle (not moving)!
log.automate-not-found: Automate mod not found. Automate No More Lag will not apply any patches.
config.idle.name: Only Process When Idle
config.idle.tooltip: Only automate when you stop moving (AFK). Disables automation while walking around. Default: false
config.idle-delay.name: Idle Delay (seconds)
config.idle-delay.tooltip: How many seconds you must stand still before automation starts. Default: 8 seconds
config.pause-cutscenes.name: Pause Timer During Cutscenes
config.pause-cutscenes.tooltip: Don't count idle time during cutscenes, events, or NPC dialogue. Timer will pause and resume when finished. Default: true
config.pause-input.name: Pause Timer On Input
config.pause-input.tooltip: Pause idle timer when any input is detected: mouse clicks/movement, keyboard keys, controller buttons, or touch screen. Prevents automation from running while you're actively interacting with the game. Default: true
config.debug.name: Debug Mode
config.debug.tooltip: Enable detailed logging to see what's happening. Check SMAPI console. Default: false
